_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Technical understanding (user-centred design) involves demonstrating knowledge of the technologies used to build and operate digital services; collaborate closely with colleagues in different digital disciplines.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating model findings and limitations to non-technical business stakeholders in terms of business impact rather than technical metrics.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-004 (OP, cosine: 0.474), AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.467).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.5/10 (raw 0.249). Shared vocabulary: [technical]. DDaT-only terms [build, centred, closely, collaborate, colleagues, demonstrating] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, communicating, findings, impact, limitations, metrics] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.854, R=0.863). Balanced P/R — the 25-word DDaT element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Technical understanding (user-centred design) involves demonstrating knowledge o" and "Skill in communicating model findings and limitations to non-technical business". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.493 > STS 0.249 (gap +0.244). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [technical] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.2%. Shared tokens: [technical]. DDaT-only: [build, centred, closely, collaborate, colleagues, demonstrating]. WIDAI-only: [business, communicating, findings, impact, limitations, metrics].
